title: ageratina triangulata
intro: Ageratina triangulata, also known as Mexican mint or White Cloud, is a perennial plant belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae). The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. Ageratina triangulata has been reported to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and alleviating respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of Ageratina triangulata can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to support immune function and overall well-being.
